commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed for the current-head real behavior proof gate; there is no narrow code defect for an automated repair lane.; Cleared: The diff stays within Matrix plugin code, docs, tests, and changelog, with no dependency, workflow, package, permission, or secret-handling changes. (sha=ac2f6602d700889622d60f3b5bb4cc2622a47153)
commands.review_summary:
The PR scopes Matrix room history and read actions by thread root, changes Matrix thread send/edit relation payloads, and updates Matrix docs, changelog, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main reads Matrix rooms flat and always emits fallback thread reply metadata, while the PR source changes both paths. The provided live output reproduces direct Matrix relation isolation and reply-shape behavior, but not the final untyped recursive filtering path.
commands.review_followup: Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed for the current-head real behavior proof gate; there is no narrow code defect for an automated repair lane.

commands.command: re-review please. updated current-head real behavior proof for the latest pr head under review, `a1326e58c6fdfd3a3d4875c91f543791c04a2f44`. the pr body now uses the exact structured field names required by `scripts/github/real-behavior-proof-check.mjs`, including: - `behavior or issue addressed` - `real environment tested` - `exact steps or command run after this patch` - `evidence after fix` - `observed result after fix` - `what was not tested` the refreshed live proof uses the current implementation path without the event-type segment: ```text /_matrix/client/v1/rooms/{roomid}/relations/{threadrootid}/m.thread ``` no docker build or restart was performed for this proof. ## real behavior proof - **behavior or issue addressed:** matrix native thread reads use the all-relation thread endpoint `/m.thread`, thread reads remain isolated by thread root, and thread reply relation payloads do not include fallback reply metadata by default. - **real environment tested:** live matrix/synapse-compatible homeserver using karabo openclaw runtime matrix credentials from a running docker container. tokens, room ids, user ids, and raw event ids are intentionally omitted. - **exact steps or command run after this patch:** created a temporary private matrix room, sent one main-room message, sent two native matrix thread roots, sent one reply under each thread root using only `m.thread` relation metadata, queried the v1 `/relations/{threadrootid}/m.thread` endpoint for each root, inspected live relation payloads, then left the temporary room. current pr head under review: `a1326e58c6fdfd3a3d4875c91f543791c04a2f44`. captured at utc: `2026-05-13t17:52:29z`. - **evidence after fix:** redacted copied live output from the real matrix setup: ```json { "captured_at_utc": "2026-05-13t17:52:29z", "homeserver_hash": "74c7bd2b1a2b", "live_matrix_actions": { "main_event_hash": "8f40308b0443", "thread_a_reply_hash": "21127706e8a9", "thread_a_root_hash": "2955d8c10015", "thread_b_reply_hash": "7eec64dfe2b5", "thread_b_root_hash": "19e603a4ea56" }, "overall_real_behavior_proof_passed": true, "pr_head": "a1326e58c6fdfd3a3d4875c91f543791c04a2f44", "reply_placement_shape": { "thread_a_has_is_falling_back": false, "thread_a_has_m_in_reply_to": false, "thread_a_rel_type": "m.thread", "thread_a_relation_keys": ["event_id", "rel_type"], "thread_b_has_is_falling_back": false, "thread_b_has_m_in_reply_to": false, "thread_b_rel_type": "m.thread", "thread_b_relation_keys": ["event_id", "rel_type"] }, "room_hash": "f5fe5b7db68b", "runtime_account_hash": "e51963bdfce8", "source": "karabo openclaw runtime matrix credentials from running docker container; tokens and raw room/event ids intentionally omitted", "v1_relations_endpoint": { "event_type_segment_present": false, "path_template": "get /_matrix/client/v1/rooms/{roomid}/relations/{threadrootid}/m.thread?dir=f&limit=20", "thread_a_contains_a_reply": true, "thread_a_contains_b_reply": false, "thread_a_isolated_from_thread_b": true, "thread_a_relation_event_hashes": ["21127706e8a9"], "thread_b_contains_a_reply": false, "thread_b_contains_b_reply": true, "thread_b_isolated_from_thread_a": true, "thread_b_relation_event_hashes": ["7eec64dfe2b5"] } } cleanup: left temporary proof room ``` - **observed result after fix:** `/relations/{threadrootid}/m.thread` returned the correct reply for each thread root; thread a did not include thread b's reply; thread b did not include thread a's reply; reply relation payloads contained only `event_id` and `rel_type`; `is_falling_back` was absent; `m.in_reply_to` was absent; the temporary proof room was left after capture. - **what was not tested:** live encrypted matrix rooms and live non-dm group rooms were not tested in this proof; those paths are covered by source inspection and focused matrix tests. this replaces the stale earlier proof that used `/m.thread/m.room.message`. <!-- clawsweeper-command-progress:start --> re-review progress: - state: review in progress - detail: targeted re-review run started; codex is reviewing the item. - run: https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/actions/runs/25848106911 - updated: 2026-05-14t07:37:51.277z <!-- clawsweeper-command-progress:end -->

commands.author: ga-it
commands.command: re-review please. i pushed the narrow pagination-token repair in `b81fdc623b5e5386df5c416c14c4d81f686d8c44`: - `readmatrixmessages({ threadid })` now treats matrix `/relations/.../m.thread` responses as relation pages with `next_batch` / `prev_batch`. - the action returns those values as openclaw `nextbatch` / `prevbatch`. - main room `/messages` pagination still uses `end` / `start` as before. - focused regression coverage now asserts thread relation pagination tokens are preserved. validation run locally: ```text node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts test files 1 passed (1) tests 12 passed (12) ``` ```text node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/actions.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.test.ts test files 3 passed (3) tests 62 passed (62) ``` ```text node scripts/check-changed.mjs # could not complete through pnpm because this host's corepack pnpm shim fails before scripts start with err_vm_dynamic_import_callback_missing. # i ran the same changed-check plan child commands directly from package.json instead: # - check:no-conflict-markers # - check:changelog-attributions # - lint:extensions:no-guarded-wildcard-reexports # - lint:extensions:no-plugin-sdk-wildcard-reexports # - dup:check:coverage # - deps:pins:check # - tsgo:extensions # - tsgo:extensions:test # - lint:extensions # - check:media-download-helpers # - check:runtime-sidecar-loaders # - check:import-cycles # result: passed ``` ```text git diff --check node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts all matched files use the correct format. ``` the pr body still includes the structured real behavior proof fields required by `scripts/github/real-behavior-proof-check.mjs`; i also updated the proof text to note the current head `b81fdc623b5e5386df5c416c14c4d81f686d8c44` and that the latest commit only changes pagination token preservation.
commands.freeform_prompt: re-review please. I pushed the narrow pagination-token repair in `b81fdc623b5e5386df5c416c14c4d81f686d8c44`: - `readMatrixMessages({ threadId })` now treats Matrix `/relations/.../m.thread` responses as relation pages with `next_batch` / `prev_batch`. - The action returns those values as OpenClaw `nextBatch` / `prevBatch`. - Main room `/messages` pagination still uses `end` / `start` as before. - Focused regression coverage now asserts thread relation pagination tokens are preserved. Validation run locally: ```text node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts Test Files 1 passed (1) Tests 12 passed (12) ``` ```text node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/actions.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.test.ts Test Files 3 passed (3) Tests 62 passed (62) ``` ```text node scripts/check-changed.mjs # Could not complete through pnpm because this host's Corepack pnpm shim fails before scripts start with ERR_VM_DYNAMIC_IMPORT_CALLBACK_MISSING. # I ran the same changed-check plan child commands directly from package.json instead: # - check:no-conflict-markers # - check:changelog-attributions # - lint:extensions:no-guarded-wildcard-reexports # - lint:extensions:no-plugin-sdk-wildcard-reexports # - dup:check:coverage # - deps:pins:check # - tsgo:extensions # - tsgo:extensions:test # - lint:extensions # - check:media-download-helpers # - check:runtime-sidecar-loaders # - check:import-cycles # result: passed ``` ```text git diff --check node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts All matched files use the correct format. ``` The PR body still includes the structured real behavior proof fields required by `scripts/github/real-behavior-proof-check.mjs`; I also updated the proof text to note the current head `b81fdc623b5e5386df5c416c14c4d81f686d8c44` and that the latest commit only changes pagination token preservation.
